sample_rows.description: Actual expenses exceed June budget by more than 15%.
June payroll increased sharply relative to May.
9 June tuition invoices are overdue or partially paid.
Two payments share the same vendor, invoice number, and amount.
Single facilities payment materially exceeds normal transaction size.
